title: Modern Industrial Bookshelf on Wheels
summary: A five-shelf ladder-style bookshelf on 2x4 legs with 2x2 rungs and caster wheels, trimmed in 1x2 and optionally accented with metal rod or cabling for an industrial look.
description:
Four long 2x4 legs form two ladder-style side frames, each rung set with 2x2 crosspieces at even intervals — this ladder-frame construction is what carries all five shelves, and it's what makes the whole piece read as industrial rather than a plain bookcase carcass. Build both side frames identically before adding any shelves.

Each of the five 1x6 shelves gets front and side 1x2 trim, which both finishes the plywood-free solid-board edge and adds real rigidity to a shelf this wide — attach the trim before mounting each shelf into the ladder frames, since it's much easier to nail trim to a flat board than to a shelf already fixed in place.

**Optional metal rod, dowel, or cabling run vertically alongside the shelves** for the industrial-accent look, held with metal angle brackets if used — this detail is purely cosmetic and can be skipped entirely. Caster wheels mount to the bottom of the legs last, letting the whole bookshelf roll.

materials.name: Metal rod, dowel, or cabling, 67-1/4 in (optional)

cutList.material: Metal rod, dowel, or cabling, 67-1/4 in (optional)

steps.title: Build the ladder frames
steps.body: Assemble the two ladder-style side frames from the legs and rungs, keeping them identical.

steps.title: Trim the shelves
steps.body: Attach the front and side trim to each of the five shelves before mounting them.

steps.title: Mount the shelves
steps.body: Fasten each trimmed shelf into the ladder frames at even, level intervals.

steps.title: Add the optional metal accents
steps.body: Mount the metal rod, dowel, or cabling alongside the shelves with metal angle brackets if using this detail.
materials: Metal rod, dowel, or cabling, 67-1/4 in (optional)

steps.title: Add the casters and finish
steps.body: Mount the caster wheels to the bottom of the legs, then sand and apply finishing supplies.

unresolvedImages.alt: Modern industrial ladder bookshelf on caster wheels
